summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSDROP Private Client Portal (Iteration 9). Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All CSDROP dashboard features working correctly with Deep Indigo + Cyan branding. Client isolation working - admin cannot access CSDROP endpoints.
passed_tests: CSDROP Login: admin@csdrop.com / nova_csdrop_2026 logs in successfully
CSDROP Login: Returns client_id=csdrop and tier=pro in user data
CSDROP Login: Auto-redirects to /dashboard/csdrop after login
CSDROP Login: Wrong password returns 401
Client Isolation: Admin (admin@nova.ai) CANNOT access /api/csdrop/dashboard (403)
Client Isolation: Admin CANNOT access /api/csdrop/execute (403)
Client Isolation: Admin CANNOT access /api/csdrop/agents (403)
Client Isolation: Unauthenticated requests return 401
Client Isolation: CSDROP user CAN access /api/csdrop/dashboard
Dashboard Stats: Shows agent_count, total_runs, bot_running, bot_log_count
Code Execution: POST /api/csdrop/execute runs Python code in sandbox
Code Execution: Safe imports work (json, math, hashlib, datetime)
Code Execution: Dangerous import 'os' blocked
Code Execution: Dangerous import 'sys' blocked
Code Execution: Dangerous import 'subprocess' blocked
Code Execution: INPUT dict receives the input_data payload
Code Execution: print() output captured in output field
Execution History: GET /api/csdrop/executions returns past runs
Bot Launch: POST /api/csdrop/launch responds correctly
Bot Stop: POST /api/csdrop/stop responds correctly
Bot Logs: GET /api/csdrop/bot-logs returns running status and logs
CSDROP Agents: GET /api/csdrop/agents returns list
CSDROP Agents: POST /api/csdrop/agents creates agent
CSDROP Agents: DELETE /api/csdrop/agents/{id} deletes agent
CSDROP Agents: POST /api/csdrop/agents/{id}/run executes agent in sandbox
Main app: Marketplace agents endpoint still works
Main app: Admin dashboard stats endpoint still works
Main app: API root endpoint still works
Frontend: CSDROP Dashboard loads with Deep Indigo + Cyan branding
Frontend: Stats cards show Agents, Total Runs, Bot Status, Logs
Frontend: Code Runner tab with code editor, JSON input, Execute button
Frontend: Sovereign Bot tab with Promo Link, Batch Size, Launch/Stop, Live Logs
Frontend: History tab shows execution history
Frontend: Code execution shows Success result with output and RESULT
Frontend: Admin redirected away from /dashboard/csdrop to /dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard still works at /dashboard
seed_data_creation: CSDROP user seeded with client_id='csdrop', tier='pro', role='client'
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSDROP Private Client Portal fully functional. The get_csdrop_user auth guard correctly rejects any user without client_id='csdrop'. Bot launch uses subprocess.Popen to run sovereign.py (requires playwright which is not installed in sandbox - expected behavior). Code execution uses RestrictedPython sandbox with safe imports (json, math, hashlib, datetime, collections, random, base64, re, string). Dangerous imports (os, sys, subprocess, socket, etc.) are blocked. CSDROP executions stored in separate csdrop_executions collection.

mocked_apis.Sovereign bot execution: Bot launch endpoint works but actual bot execution requires playwright which is not installed in sandbox environment - this is expected behavior
mocked_apis.Studio Vibe Mode AI chat: Uses local generateAssistantResponse function (pattern matcher, not real LLM)

authentication.csdrop_login: Working - returns token with client_id=csdrop, tier=pro

client_isolation.csdrop_access: Working - CSDROP user can access all endpoints

bot_controls.logs: Working - returns running status and log lines
